calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Approving Defendant'S Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Jun-02-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Plaintiff Nancy Fattlar telephone number 925-833-0200 in Propria Persona.
James Robinson of Shopoff Cavallo & Kirsch LLP telephone number 415-984-1975 for Defendant Lucy Logan.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT LUCY LOGAN'S Motion For Order Approving Defendant'S Attorneys Fees is denied. Ms. Logan's sole basis for seeking fees against Ms. Fattlar is that Ms. Fattlar's husband entered into a settlement agreement providing for fees to be awarded to the prevailing party in any action seeking to enforce that agreement. It is undisputed that Ms. Fattlar is not a party to that agreement. Therefore, Ms. Fattlar is not bound by that agreement even if, as asserted by Ms. Logan, the funds to pay for the fees would come from the community property Ms. Fattlar co-owns with Mr. Fattlar. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Approving Defendant'S Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Apr-25-2016 Continued To Jun-02-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

DEFENDANT LUCY LOGAN'S Motion For Order Approving Defendant'S Attorneys Fees is continued to June 2, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302 per parties' agreement and email to the court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
